'''竏喇-sh-b''' ('''kahashab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:longline|longline]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:longline|longline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喇-sh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kahashab
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihashab|thihashab]] || [[word:jihashab|jihashab]] || [[word:shihashab|shihashab]] || [[word:kihashab|kihashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhashab|thuthuhashab]] || [[word:jujuhashab|jujuhashab]] || [[word:shushuhashab|shushuhashab]] || [[word:kukuhashab|kukuhashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhashab|thuhashab]] || [[word:juhashab|juhashab]] || [[word:shuhashab|shuhashab]] || [[word:kuhashab|kuhashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhashab|thuhashab]] || [[word:juhashab|juhashab]] || [[word:shuhashab|shuhashab]] || [[word:kuhashab|kuhashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehashab|thehashab]] || [[word:jehashab|jehashab]] || [[word:shehashab|shehashab]] || [[word:kehashab|kehashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohashab|thothohashab]] || [[word:jojohashab|jojohashab]] || [[word:shoshohashab|shoshohashab]] || [[word:kokohashab|kokohashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohashab|thohashab]] || [[word:johashab|johashab]] || [[word:shohashab|shohashab]] || [[word:kohashab|kohashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohashab|thohashab]] || [[word:johashab|johashab]] || [[word:shohashab|shohashab]] || [[word:kohashab|kohashab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]] || [[word:hashab|hashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦhashab|thﾃｦhashab]] || [[word:jﾃｦhashab|jﾃｦhashab]] || [[word:shﾃｦhashab|shﾃｦhashab]] || [[word:kﾃｦhashab|kﾃｦhashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahashab|thathahashab]] || [[word:jajahashab|jajahashab]] || [[word:shashahashab|shashahashab]] || [[word:kakahashab|kakahashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahashab|thahashab]] || [[word:jahashab|jahashab]] || [[word:shahashab|shahashab]] || [[word:kahashab|kahashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahashab|thahashab]] || [[word:jahashab|jahashab]] || [[word:shahashab|shahashab]] || [[word:kahashab|kahashab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahashab|shahashab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahashab|goshahashab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahashab|gokishahashab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahashabnﾃｼ|shahashabnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahashabnknﾃｼ|goshahashabnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashabnﾃｼ|gokishahashabnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahashabshﾃｫ|shahashabshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahashabnkshﾃｫ|goshahashabnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahashabshﾃｫ|gokishahashabshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashabro|shahashabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashabnkro|goshahashabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashabro|gokishahashabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashabmu|shahashabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashabnkmu|goshahashabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashabmu|gokishahashabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahashabsher|shahashabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahashabnksher|goshahashabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahashabsher|gokishahashabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahashabng|shahashabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahashabnkng|goshahashabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahashabng|gokishahashabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahashabya|shahashabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahashabnkya|goshahashabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahashabya|gokishahashabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahashabyam|shahashabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahashabnkyam|goshahashabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahashabyam|gokishahashabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahashabnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shahashabnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahashabnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshahashabnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahashabnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishahashabnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashabnﾃｼro|shahashabnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashabnknﾃｼro|goshahashabnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashabnﾃｼro|gokishahashabnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashabnﾃｼmu|shahashabnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashabnknﾃｼmu|goshahashabnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashabnﾃｼmu|gokishahashabnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahashabshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shahashabshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahashabnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshahashabnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashabshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishahashabshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashabshﾃｫro|shahashabshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashabnkshﾃｫro|goshahashabnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashabshﾃｫro|gokishahashabshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashabshﾃｫmu|shahashabshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashabnkshﾃｫmu|goshahashabnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashabshﾃｫmu|gokishahashabshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahashabronﾃｼ|shahashabronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahashabnkronﾃｼ|goshahashabnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashabronﾃｼ|gokishahashabronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahashabroshﾃｫ|shahashabroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahashabnkroshﾃｫ|goshahashabnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahashabroshﾃｫ|gokishahashabroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashabromu|shahashabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashabnkromu|goshahashabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashabromu|gokishahashabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahashabmunﾃｼ|shahashabmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahashabnkmunﾃｼ|goshahashabnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashabmunﾃｼ|gokishahashabmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahashabmushﾃｫ|shahashabmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahashabnkmushﾃｫ|goshahashabnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahashabmushﾃｫ|gokishahashabmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashabmuro|shahashabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashabnkmuro|goshahashabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashabmuro|gokishahashabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
